Back to website Python lab Docs index

Googlesql Builtins.Py

Clean code reading view for studying, copying, and comparing your own implementation.

emergency-path/.venv/Lib/site-packages/pygments/lexers/_googlesql_builtins.py

Runs the exact Python code shown below. Output is saved in this browser.


    

    
    
    

      
"""
    pygments.lexers._googlesql_builtins
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    Autogenerated data files for the GoogleSQL lexer.

    :copyright: Copyright 2006-present by the Pygments team, see AUTHORS.
    :license: BSD, see LICENSE for details.
"""

constants = [
    'FALSE',
    'NULL',
    'TRUE',
    'UNKNOWN',
]

# Everything below this line is auto-generated from the GoogleSQL source code.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

On this page
No headings found.
